response.step_by_step_log:
1. Video analyzed and scenes identified based on the two songs performed.
2. Song metadata for 'Kirameki Rider☆' found on screen and verified via search. Lyrics retrieved from multiple sources.
3. Song metadata for 'Deno Piyua Oshi Daigen' identified on screen as a Hololive original with composers Yusuke Takeda and Seima Kondo. Search for lyrics failed.
4. JSON prepared with all fields, including the original lyrics for the first song and an indication of unavailability for the second.
response.global_summary: A video featuring performances by Hololive VTubers. The first song is 'Kirameki Rider☆' and the second is an original song titled 'Deno Piyua Oshi Daigen'.

scenes.description: The video begins with a performance of the song 'Kirameki Rider☆'. The performers are Sakura Miko, Oozora Subaru, and Shiranui Flare. The lyrics are displayed on screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Sakura Miko, Oozora Subaru, Shiranui Flare
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
生まれたてのドキドキを響かせよう
最高の時間 最高の仲間と キラメキに乗って☆
(イェーイ!)
覚えてるかな? 最初の歌 (懐かしいね)
私 声が震えていた (ほんの少し)
あの日から続く未来は
みんなと掴んだ今日だよ
もっともっともっともっと 加速するハート
(一緒に) 行くよ どこまでも
(Are you ready?) 準備はOK?
ひらけ!! 夢のトビラを (1, 2, 3)
(キラメキライダー☆)
生まれたてのドキドキを響かせよう
最高の時間 最高の仲間と
ここにいるよ 見つけてくれたから
君に会いたくてやって来たんだ みんなで歌おう
終わらないメロディ キラメキに乗って☆
届いてるかな? 私の声 (はっきりと)
届けたいのは君に笑顔 (そのスマイル!)
理想の遠さに悔しくて
みんなと泣き笑ったね
ぎゅっと ぎゅっと ぎゅっと ぎゅっと 全て抱きしめて
(一緒に) 行こう どこまでも
(Are you ready?) 準備はOK!
すすめ!! 希望の道を (1, 2, 3)
(キラメキライダー☆)
好きな気持ち カラフルに奏でたいな
最高の場所 最高のみんなと
ここにいるよ 幻なんかじゃない
君の心が幸せに染まるように
重ねてくハーモニー キラメキ纏って☆
歌い続けたいな 踊り続けたいな
そんな願いや わがままもいいでしょ?
だって楽しすぎて! もうとまらない!!
輝くステージで もっともっと!! (お願い) ずっと!!
(オー!) (イェーイ!)
嬉しい 楽しい 愛しい だけじゃ語れない
今も 今も 悩みはあるけど
ここにいるよ 私 ここにいるよ
君と同じ世界を見つめて
(行くよ?) (キラメキライダー☆)
生まれたてのドキドキを響かせよう
最高の時間 最高の仲間と
ここにいるよ 見つけてくれたから
君に会いたくてやって来たんだ みんなで歌おう
(せーのっ!)
終わらないメロディ キラメキに乗って☆
キラメキ纏って☆
(イェーイ!)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Let's make the newborn heart-pounding sensation resonate
With the best time and the best companions, riding on the sparkle ☆
(Yeah!)
Do you remember? The first song (It's nostalgic, right?)
My voice was trembling (Just a little bit)
The future that continues from that day
Is today that we grasped together with everyone
More, more, more, more, accelerating heart
(Together) Let's go anywhere
(Are you ready?) Preparation is OK?
Open!! The door of dreams (1, 2, 3)
(Kirameki Rider☆)
Let's make the newborn heart-pounding sensation resonate
With the best time and the best companions
I'm here because you found me
I came here because I wanted to meet you, let's sing with everyone
An unending melody, riding on the sparkle ☆
Can you hear it? My voice (Clearly)
What I want to deliver is a smile to you (That smile!)
Frustrated by the distance of my ideal
We cried and laughed together, didn't we?
Tight, tight, tight, tight, embrace everything
(Together) Let's go anywhere
(Are you ready?) Preparation is OK!
Advance!! The road of hope (1, 2, 3)
(Kirameki Rider☆)
I want to play my favorite feelings in colorful colors
In the best place with the best everyone
I'm here, it's not a hallucination
So that your heart will be dyed with happiness
Wearing the harmony we've layered, riding on the sparkle ☆
I want to keep singing, I want to keep dancing
Such wishes and selfishness are fine, right?
Because it's too fun! I can't stop anymore!!
On the shining stage, more, more!! (Please) forever!!
(Oh!) (Yeah!)
I can't just talk about happiness, fun, and love
Even now, even now, I have worries, but
I'm here, I'm here
Looking at the same world as you
(Are you ready?) (Kirameki Rider☆)
Let's make the newborn heart-pounding sensation resonate
With the best time and the best companions
I'm here because you found me
I came here because I wanted to meet you, let's sing with everyone
(Ready, go!)
An unending melody, riding on the sparkle ☆
Wearing the sparkle ☆
(Yeah!)

scenes.description: The second song is 'Deno Piyua Oshi Daigen'. The performers are Shirakami Fubuki, Oozora Subaru, Sakura Miko, and Shiranui Flare. Lyrics for this song are not available online.
scenes.performer_in_video: Shirakami Fubuki, Oozora Subaru, Sakura Miko, Shiranui Flare
